summary: Reposted KEZI 9 television news segment. A reporter with long hair stands for a live standup outside a single-story building signed 'VFW POST 584,' with a lower-third 'RACHEL McCONAGHIE / LIVE. LOCAL. LATE BREAKING.' and a 'KEZI 9' bug and weather strip. The audio is reporting tied to the Pearl Harbor anniversary. The tweet text says the Labor Department honored a Pearl Harbor survivor.

script.scene: Reporter does a live standup outside a building signed 'VFW POST 584'; chyron 'RACHEL McCONAGHIE / LIVE. LOCAL. LATE BREAKING.'
